Title: survey-pdf Upgraded jsPDF Version Due to Security Vulnerability
Description: The following security vulnerability was identified in jsPDF versions <=3.0.4: [Local File Inclusion/Path Traversal](https://github.com/parallax/jsPDF/security/advisories/GHSA-f8cm-6447-x5h2).
AffectedVersions: All versions before 1.12.59, all versions starting from 2.0.0 before 2.5.5
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 1.12.59 before 2.0.0, all versions starting from 2.5.5
